title: The King - Dinner
description:
Yes...I have discovered the amazing free program "Audacity" and have added yet another to my "Morshu Breaks Out In Song" collection....only this time around it is the King breaking out into song.

I was too lazy to make any funny pictures, so I just took a load of screenshots from the CDi cutscenes and slapped them into a video...except for the last picture.  That one I drew and submitted to deviantArt back in December 2008. Here's a link to the original v
http://cptfarfegnugen.deviantart.com/art/Mobile-Suit-Gundam-King-107168921
Check out my other stuff, too.

Enjoy, and if you want to make a request, learn how to use Audacity yourself -_-
